name: Hacienda Hamburger
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil in an electric skillet or large frying pan.
2. Add celery and onion; cover and cook slowly for 10 minutes.
3. Add tomato paste, water, noodles, cheese, olives, salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir to combine everything evenly.
4. Cover and cook until the noodles are tender, which should take about 30 minutes.
NOTE:
This is just as good on the second day.
